2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://bankaxept.no/tjenester/kontanttjenester"> <div class="image-ratio" style="max-width:400px;; aspect-ratio: auto 540.0/546.0"> <div class="image-wrapper" style="padding-top:calc(1.01111
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="secondary-btn ffe-button ffe-button--secondary id-549477983" href="https://bankaxept.no/tjenester/kontanttjenester" onclick="" rel="noopener" target="_blank"> <span class="ffe-button__label"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-controls="#messageForm" class="message-section__show-form ffe-button ffe-button--primary" href="#/" role="button"> <span class="ffe-primary-button__text">Jeg er ikke kunde</span> </a>
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="ffe-h4"> Medlemsfordeler på BSU: </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="message-section__title ffe-h4"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice/sparing-og-pensjon/ma-jeg-bruke-min-bsu-ved-kjop.html"></a>

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice/sparing-og-pensjon/ma-jeg-bruke-min-bsu-ved-kjop.html"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Page is missing h1 heading

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Personal data field 'contact name for appointment day' missing autocomplete attribute

Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Om banken SpareBank 1 Østlandet | SpareBank 1 Østlandet

https://www.sparebank1.no/nb/ostlandet/om-oss.html
Avvik: 32 | Bestått: 125
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (15 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" class="inline-svg responsive" height="50" src="/content/dam/SB1/ikoner/GUI-ikoner/logo-sparebank1_ostlandet.svg" width="180"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" class="inline-svg responsive" data-lazy-breakpoint="768px" data-lazy-largesrc="/content/dam/SB1/ikoner/hjerte-ikon.svg" data-lazy-smallsrc="/content/dam/SB1/ikoner/hjerte-ikon.
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="message-section__title ffe-h4"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'contact name for appointment day' missing autocomplete attribute

<select class="ffe-dropdown" name="Contact name for appointment day"> <option disabled="" selected="" value="">Velg dag</option> <option value="Mandag">Mandag</option> <option value="Tirsdag">Tirsdag<
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'fortell oss hva du ønsker å snakke om' missing autocomplete attribute

<textarea class="ffe-textarea input-message" name="Fortell oss hva du ønsker å snakke om"></textarea>
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'telefonnummer' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Telefonnummer" required="true" type="tel"/>
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'fornavn' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Fornavn" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='given-name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'etternavn' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Etternavn" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='family-name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'telefonnummer' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="ffe-input-field" id="Telefonnummer" name="Telefonnummer" required="true" type="tel"/>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Når kan jeg søke om grønt boliglån?</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Hjelp på veien for energitiltak i egen bolig</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="message-section__title ffe-h4"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.enova.no/privat/anbefalte-energitiltak-for-ditt-hus/bygge-nytt-hus/" target="_blank">Se listen hos ENOVA</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.ydalirbydel.no/" target="_blank">kjøp av nybygd bolig på Ydalir i Elverum (ZEN).</a>

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.finansportalen.no/" target="_blank">Finansportalen.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3 class="message-section__title ffe-h4"></h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.norges-bank.no/tema/Statistikk/Valutakurser/" target="_blank">Se flere valutaer hos Norges bank.</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'contact name for appointment day' missing autocomplete attribute

<select class="ffe-dropdown" name="Contact name for appointment day"> <option disabled="" selected="" value="">Velg dag</option> <option value="Mandag">Mandag</option> <option value="Tirsdag">Tirsdag<
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'fortell oss hva du ønsker å snakke om' missing autocomplete attribute

<textarea class="ffe-textarea input-message" name="Fortell oss hva du ønsker å snakke om"></textarea>
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'telefonnummer' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Telefonnummer" required="true" type="tel"/>
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'fornavn' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Fornavn" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='given-name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'etternavn' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="ffe-input-field" name="Etternavn" type="text"/>

Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

<input class="ffe-input-field" id="Telefonnummer" name="Telefonnummer" required="true" type="tel"/>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)

https://www.sparebank1.no/nb/ostlandet/om-oss/samfunnsansvar/gaver-spons.html

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat.html"> <picture> <img aria-hidden="true" class="inline-svg responsive" height="50" src="/content/dam/SB1/ikoner/GUI-ikoner/logo-sparebank1_ostlandet.svg" width="180"/> </
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://sparebankstiftelsenhedmark.no/" target="_blank">Sparebankstiftelsen Hedmark</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.totenssparebankstiftelse.no/" target="_blank">Totens Sparebankstiftelse</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til kundeservice'

<a href="/nb/ostlandet/privat/kundeservice.html">Gå til kundeservice</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="page-nav"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-menu">Til hovedmeny</a> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content">Til hovedinnhold</a> </nav>
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
